question.label: First move
question.name: Given what we've covered, where do you want to focus first?
question.description: Ends the conversation with an open, employee-shaped next focus.

answer: If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.

assessment.note: He is willing to commit, which is a mild positive growth signal, but conditions it on a precisely defined path, signaling unresolved clarity.

new_queue.label: First move
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to shift before we next meet?

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What support from me would make that path clearer?

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I have been less present in rituals, yes.
After the promotion decision, I was not clear on what really needed to change.
I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
Mentoring has been one place where I still feel useful.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
I want clearer criteria, not reassurance.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.
If we can define the path precisely, I will commit to it.
